page_metadata.biotools__summary: PHONEMeS (PHOsphorylation NEtworks for Mass Spectrometry) is a method to model signalling networks based on untargeted phosphoproteomics mass spectrometry data and kinase/phosphatase-substrate interactions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PHONEMeS (PHOsphorylation NEtworks for Mass Spectrometry) is a method to model signalling networks based on untargeted phosphoproteomics mass spectrometry data and kinase/phosphatase-substrate interactions.
